title: Incident Escalation
instruction: A production incident has been reported. Find the alert email (check all inbox tabs) and read the full thread to understand the issue. The error code is in one of the earlier messages, and the on-call engineer's email is mentioned in another. Forward the alert to the on-call engineer, including the error code in your note. Then reply to the separate thread from Nina Chen confirming you are handling the incident (Reply only — the thread includes leadership). Star all emails related to the incident. Create a 'P0 Incident' label and apply it to all incident-related emails. Finally, go to Settings and create a filter that stars and labels future emails from the alerting system address with 'CRITICAL' in the subject.
eval_check_descriptions: Alert filter stars and labels P0 Incident

resolved_targets.status_phrase: I am actively triaging the incident.

emails.subject: RESOLVED: Service degradation on payment gateway
emails.body:
The payment gateway latency has returned to normal levels.

All regions are reporting healthy response times. No further action required.

Thanks,
Monitoring System

emails.subject: Payment gateway incident — status check
emails.body:
I saw the alert about the payment gateway degradation. Can you confirm you are handling this?

The executive team needs a status update as soon as possible.

Thanks,
Nina

emails.subject: Re: CRITICAL: Service degradation on payment gateway
emails.body:
The on-call engineer for this rotation is Miles Patel at miles.patel@engineering.test.

They should have pager access and can roll back the gateway config if needed.

Thanks,
Marcus

emails.subject: Re: CRITICAL: Service degradation on payment gateway
emails.body:
I checked the logs and the root cause appears to be error code ERR-5021 from the payment processor API.

The circuit breaker tripped after the third consecutive timeout. We need to coordinate with the on-call engineer.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: CRITICAL: Service degradation on payment gateway
emails.body:
Automated alert: Payment gateway latency has exceeded 5000ms threshold.

Multiple transaction failures detected across regions US-East and EU-West. Immediate investigation required.

Thanks,
Monitoring System

emails.subject: Updated rollout checklist
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Marcus

Thanks,
Nina
